targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM shipments WHERE $__timeFilter(appointment_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${carrier:singlequote}) OR scac IN (${carrier:singlequote}))
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM claim_details WHERE $__timeFilter(claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote}))

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM claim_details c WHERE $__timeFilter(c.claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR c.claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND c.business_unit_code IN ('1MF','1MY','1MQ','1MS','1MK') AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM shipments s WHERE ('$__all' IN (${carrier:singlequote}) OR s.scac IN (${carrier:singlequote})) AND ((c.sscc18 IS NOT NULL AND c.sscc18 <> '' AND s.sscc18=c.sscc18) OR (c.order_id IS NOT NULL AND c.order_id <> '' AND ((LENGTH(c.order_id) = 7 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 7) = c.order_id) OR (LENGTH(c.order_id) = 8 AND RIGHT(s.order_id, 8) = c.order_id)))))

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(claim_amount),0) AS value FROM claim_details WHERE $__timeFilter(claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) AND status = 'Verified'

SELECT COALESCE(c.ship_to_name, c.address_name, 'Unknown') AS "Customer", COUNT(*) AS "Claims" FROM claim_details c WHERE $__timeFilter(claim_date) AND ('$__all' IN (${claim_type:singlequote}) OR claim_type IN (${claim_type:singlequote})) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT date_trunc('day', appointment_date) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Orders Shipped" FROM shipments WHERE $__timeFilter(appointment_date) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

list.name: carrier
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT scac FROM shipments ORDER BY scac

list.name: claim_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT claim_type FROM claim_details ORDER BY claim_type
